queries.dax: DEFINE VAR _Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR _Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) EVALUATE { CALCULATE(FORMAT([% global bien], "0.0000"), Calendario[Mes] = _Mes, YEAR(pereira[FechaSolo]) = _Anio) }

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR ( TODAY () ) VAR __Mes = MONTH ( TODAY () ) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS ( 'pereira'[recomendaria], TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), "Countrecomendaria", CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), "pereiraCountrecomendaria", IGNORE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ) ) ), "PctRecomendaria", FORMAT ( DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), ALL ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) ), "0.00" ), "PctRecomendariaPct", FORMAT ( 100.0 * DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), ALL ( 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'pereira'[recomendaria] ), MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) ), "0.00" ) ) VAR __DS0BodyLimited = TOPN ( 1002, __DS0Core, [Countrecomendaria], 0, 'pereira'[recomendaria], 1 ) EVALUATE __DS0BodyLimited ORDER BY [Countrecomendaria] DESC, 'pereira'[recomendaria]

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) VAR __Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR __Filtro = FILTER ( 'pereira', MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes && YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) VAR __DS0Core = UNION ( ROW ( "Categoria", "ACTITUD Y CALIDEZ", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% bien Actitud y Calidez], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% mala Actitud y Calidez], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "COMUNICACIÓN Y TRANSPARENCIA", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% bien Comunicación y transparencia], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% mala Comunicación y transparencia], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "EXCELENCIA Y CALIDAD", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% bien Excelencia y calidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% mala Excelencia y calidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "RESPETO Y RESPONSABILIDAD", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% bien Respeto y responsabilidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[% mala Respeto y responsabilidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ) ) VAR __DS0BodyLimited = TOPN ( 1002, __DS0Core, [Categoria], 1, [PctBien], 0 ) EVALUATE __DS0BodyLimited ORDER BY [Categoria]

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) VAR __Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR __Filtro = FILTER ( 'pereira', MONTH ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Mes && YEAR ( 'pereira'[FechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) VAR __Out = ROW ( "ciudad", "Pereira", "anio", __Anio, "mes", __Mes, "total_encuestas", CALCULATE ( 'pereira'[Encuesta], __Filtro ) ) EVALUATE __Out
DEFINE VAR _Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR _Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) EVALUATE { CALCULATE(FORMAT([% armenia global bien], "0.0000"), Calendario[Mes] = _Mes, YEAR(armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo]) = _Anio) }

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) VAR __Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR __DS0Core = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria], TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), "Countrecomendaria", CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), MONTH ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), "armeniaCountrecomendaria", IGNORE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ) ) ), "PctRecomendaria", FORMAT ( DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), MONTH ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), ALL ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), MONTH ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) ), "0.00" ), "PctRecomendariaPct", FORMAT ( 100.0 * DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), MONTH ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ), CALCULATE ( COUNTA ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), ALL ( 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), TREATAS ( { "PROMOTOR", "PASIVO", "DETRACTOR" }, 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria] ), MONTH ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes, YEAR ( armenia[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) ), "0.00" ) ) VAR __DS0BodyLimited = TOPN ( 1002, __DS0Core, [Countrecomendaria], 0, 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria], 1 ) EVALUATE __DS0BodyLimited ORDER BY [Countrecomendaria] DESC, 'armenia'[armenia recomendaria]

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR ( TODAY () ) VAR __Mes = MONTH ( TODAY () ) VAR __Filtro = FILTER ( 'armenia', MONTH ( 'armenia'[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Mes && YEAR ( 'armenia'[ArmeniaFechaSolo] ) = __Anio ) VAR __DS0Core = UNION ( ROW ( "Categoria", "ACTITUD Y CALIDEZ", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia bien Actitud y Calidez], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia mala Actitud y Calidez], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "COMUNICACIÓN Y TRANSPARENCIA", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia bien Comunicación y transparencia], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia mala Comunicación y transparencia], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "EXCELENCIA Y CALIDAD", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia bien Excelencia y calidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia mala Excelencia y calidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ), ROW ( "Categoria", "RESPETO Y RESPONSABILIDAD", "PctBien", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia bien Respeto y responsabilidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ), "PctMala", FORMAT ( CALCULATE ( 'armenia'[% armenia mala Respeto y responsabilidad], __Filtro ), "0.00" ) ) ) VAR __DS0BodyLimited = TOPN ( 1002, __DS0Core, [Categoria], 1, [PctBien], 0 ) EVALUATE __DS0BodyLimited ORDER BY [Categoria]

DEFINE VAR __Anio = YEAR(TODAY()) VAR __Mes = MONTH(TODAY()) VAR __Filtro = FILTER('armenia', MONTH('armenia'[ArmeniaFechaSolo]) = __Mes && YEAR('armenia'[ArmeniaFechaSolo]) = __Anio) VAR __Out = ROW("ciudad", "Armenia", "anio", __Anio, "mes", __Mes, "total_encuestas", CALCULATE('armenia'[Encuestas], __Filtro)) EVALUATE __Out
